note: golden_hash filled by golden-parity.test.mjs --update. Vector 1 is a normal in-depth conversion; vector 2 exceeds the declared 30% pool-utilization guard; vector 3 is the empty-input finite-gate edge.

vectors.name: normal_conversion_within_depth
vectors.description: 1000 fee-token units converted at 0.9970 against deep pool reserves; well within the 30% utilization guard.

output_payload.note: Fee-AMM rate (0.9970 / 30bps LP fee) per docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/fees/spec-fee. Pool-utilization guard is a declared calculator parameter, not a Tempo protocol constant.

vectors.name: insufficient_liquidity
vectors.description: Requested conversion would consume more than the declared 30% max pool utilization -- output-or-failure returns failure, not a partial fill.

output_payload.note: Fee-AMM rate (0.9970 / 30bps LP fee) per docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/fees/spec-fee. Pool-utilization guard is a declared calculator parameter, not a Tempo protocol constant.

vectors.name: empty_input_finite_gate
vectors.description: Empty policy_parameters must reject cleanly (MALFORMED_INPUT), never emit NaN/Infinity.
